hero.title: Fun & Fitness Hydrotherapy
hero.intro: Let Your Dog Splash and Play

sections.title: Let Your Dog Splash and Play
paragraphs: Is your dog a water lover? Then our fun and fitness sessions are perfect for them.
Our heated hydrotherapy pool provides a safe and fun environment for dogs to swim, play, and socialise.
Note: Owners are required to be present for all hydrotherapy sessions.

sections.title: Benefits of Fun & Fitness Hydrotherapy
bullets: Exercise and fitness: Low-impact workouts for cardiovascular health and muscle building.
Mental stimulation: Water play helps prevent boredom.
Socialisation: Controlled interaction with other dogs.
Confidence building: Helps dogs become confident in water.
Stress relief: Swimming can release energy and reduce stress.

sections.title: Our Fun & Fitness Sessions
paragraphs: Sessions are supervised by our certified hydrotherapist to ensure safety and wellbeing.
We welcome dogs of all ages, breeds, and swimming abilities.
Looking for a dog swimming pool near me or a big swimming pool for dogs in Kidderminster? Bring your furry friend to K9 Leisure Club for a splashing good time!
